text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: Wow… So you want to wear these for the Droite? Wait, this color is—— …And we'll both be in dresses, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I want our outfits to match in both color and form. 
…That's how the two of us are meant to shine.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: ——Agreed! I wouldn't have it any other way, Tact.

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
If all I wanted to bloom all by myself, I'd be dancing solo. 
And believe me, I'll make everyone on the dance floor mine!

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text:
But you told me you would give me the honor of "Best Date". 
And that's an honor the two of us have to win together.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
Yes. …Draped in the same colors, shining in the same way… 
…We'll show them a brilliance that only the two of us can.

text_block_list.name: Daring Tact
text_block_list.text:
I ask you once again, will you take my hand, Heart-san? 
Will you come with me, so the two of us may bloom as one?

text_block_list.name: Daring Heart
text_block_list.text: ——It would be my pleasure.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
(Tact-san, Heart-san—— Thank goodness. 
It seems they've found their blessing——)

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
(——…And the other dates have, too. With the Droite in their 
sights, they've rediscovered their feelings toward one another 
and renewed their bonds, making each other shine brighter.)

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
(The Ligne Droite is a time for exchanging blessings imbued with 
priceless feelings. It lasts for only a single night——)

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
(But, fleeting as it is… If it means they can experience this brilliant 
moment, glittering clearly in the darkness like the queen of the 
night, so it may remain in their hearts——)

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
If it means making such a Droite a reality—— 
I want to do more.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: There's so much more work I want to do——!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
——Thanks, Bouquet-chan! See, I tried out your idea 
of making lighter movements… And I think this'll be 
the key to that "racing dance" we're going for!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to tell Bakushin O-chan about it. 
Thanks so much for indulging us and helping us pull it off♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, it's my pleasure—— 
I am looking forward to watching the two of you dance, after all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right—— Flight-san, I'd like to ask you for reference—— 
Which of these flowers do you like?

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Flowers? …Whoa, that's a lot of options! 
You put all of this together yourself? Wow…!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… I think I like those bright, pretty anemone flowers… 
Are these for decorating the venue, Bouquet-chan?

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I discussed this with the committee lead, and proposed that we 
have more flowers than any year before.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
We also discussed making it so the attendees to be able to give each 
other "Blessed Bouquets".

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
I want to provide a counter with wrapping paper and 
ribbons. This way, everyone can take their pick of the 
flowers in the venue and make their own bouquets.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
For us on the committee, allowing the attendees to give such meaningful 
gifts to those dear to them would be our small way of blessing them.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
And for the couple who win Best Date, we have a special blessing—— No, 
I mustn't. Heehee. I will leave that as a surprise for the main event.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Blessings… 
Blessings, huh…

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
…Hey, Bouquet-chan. 
I haven't told anyone about this——

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
But actually… When you asked us about doing the exhibition dance… For a 
second, I wasn't sure if I could do it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text: What…? Were you really?

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. Well, Bakushin O-chan gave you the OK right away, so 
I didn't exactly get the chance to say no! 
…But I really was unsure.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
I remembered the way Bakushin O-chan and I danced 
back then, when we won Best Date… And I couldn't help 
but think, can I really dance like that again?

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text: Because I… I left the front lines. And I left her behind.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Racing with her at the Mile Championship was so, so fun! 
It felt like the two of us could keep running together, forever!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
As long as I'm with you, and because I'm with you! 
That short mile, that fleeting minute and a half… 
It was our everything!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
But, I… 
I left her behind.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Even after I left the spotlight, Bakushin O-chan was as amazing as 
ever. Once again, she proudly shouted her name from on high, as the 
Absolute King of Speed——

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Biko-chan ran even faster than Bakushin O-chan did the year before when 
she won. But even then, Biko-chan got second.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text: Because Bakushin O-chan—— she won by four whole lengths.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
She was amazing. 
So, so amazing… She shined so blindingly bright——

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text: …Almost too bright for me to bear.

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
(Flight-san… So that's the reason you were worried about being with 
Bakushin O-san again——)

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text: ——But you know!

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Even through this new dance, Bakushin O-chan, she's… 
She's inviting me to run with her again.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Plus… Bouquet-chan. 
Thanks to your tender wishes for our happiness… 
I can be brave.

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
…Teehee. Hey, Bouquet-chan. Can you turn your ear here for a second? 
There's a little something you helped me think of——

text_block_list.name: Curren Bouquetd'or
text_block_list.text:
Yes——? 
……………W-What!? Oh, my… 
After the Droite——!?

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Do you think you can help me, Bouquet-chan? 
…I'm going to have to put everything I've got into it…

text_block_list.name: North Flight
text_block_list.text:
Because I think I've always… 
I've always wanted to be a blessing to her!
